prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This guidance pertains specifically to the Nationally Significant Infrastructure Projects (NSIP) consent process under the Planning Act 2008, which applies to England. It details the examination procedures and requirements that are relevant to applications for development consent within this regulatory framework.
